FOOTER.TAGLINE: Secure, fast and private P2P file sharing. No cloud server, native end-to-end encryption.

HOME.HERO_SUBTITLE: Direct device-to-device transfer. No cloud server. Native end-to-end encryption. Unlimited size.
HOME.SECURITY_DESC: All transfers are natively protected with end-to-end encryption via WebRTC protocol (DTLS 1.2+). Your files never pass through our servers.
HOME.FEATURE_FAST_DESC: Direct P2P transfer without intermediary servers
HOME.FEATURE_SIMPLE_DESC: Drag & drop, generate link and share in seconds
HOME.FEATURE_PREMIUM_DESC: Unlimited files, advanced encryption, zero ads

HERO.LABEL: About Us
HERO.SUBTITLE: Bam! was born with a simple mission: give back control of your files to you. No cloud, no intermediaries. Only direct, secure and private connections.

HERO.LABEL: Plans & Pricing
HERO.SUBTITLE: Choose the perfect plan for your needs

HERO.LABEL: Security
HERO.SUBTITLE: Every transfer on Bam! is protected by end-to-end encryption. No file ever transits our servers.

E2EE.LABEL: Protocol
E2EE.TITLE: Native End-to-End Encryption
E2EE.P1_A: Every WebRTC connection established on Bam! uses the
E2EE.P1_B: (Datagram Transport Layer Security) protocol to automatically encrypt all data in transit. This happens at the transport layer, without any configuration by the user.
E2EE.P2: Encryption is active by default on every transfer, regardless of the chosen plan. Data is encrypted by the sender's browser and decrypted exclusively by the recipient's browser. No intermediary — including Bam! — can access the file content.

PASSWORD.LABEL: Premium
PASSWORD.TITLE: Premium Password Encryption
PASSWORD.P1_A: Premium users can add an extra layer of protection with
PASSWORD.P1_B: encryption. The encryption key is derived from the user's chosen password via
PASSWORD.P2_A: The entire operation happens through the native browser's
PASSWORD.P2_B: . The password is never transmitted or stored: only the sender and recipient know it. Completely

INTEGRITY.LABEL: Integrity
INTEGRITY.TITLE: Integrity Verification
INTEGRITY.P1_A: Every transferred file is verified via
INTEGRITY.P1_B: hash. The hash is calculated on the sender side before sending and compared on the receiver side upon download completion, guaranteeing the file was not altered during transfer.
INTEGRITY.RANGE_SM_DESC: SubtleCrypto — native browser API, fast and synchronous.
INTEGRITY.RANGE_MD_DESC: CryptoJS — incremental hash for medium-sized files.
INTEGRITY.RANGE_LG_DESC: Web Worker + hash-wasm — non-blocking computation in separate thread.

ZERO_CLOUD.LABEL: Architecture
ZERO_CLOUD.TITLE: Zero-Cloud Architecture
ZERO_CLOUD.P1_A: Bam! never uploads your files to any server. The architecture is entirely
ZERO_CLOUD.P1_B: : the file travels directly from the sender's browser to the recipient's browser via WebRTC.
ZERO_CLOUD.P2_B: — the initial exchange of metadata needed to establish a direct connection between the two peers. Once the connection is established, the servers are no longer involved. No file, no fragment, no byte of your content ever transits through our infrastructure.

VULN.TITLE: Vulnerability Reporting
VULN.P1: We believe in collaborative security. If you discover a vulnerability or security issue, we invite you to responsibly report it to us.
VULN.P2_POST: with a detailed description of the issue. We commit to responding within 48 hours and resolving confirmed vulnerabilities as quickly as possible.

GDPR.TITLE: GDPR Compliance
GDPR.DESC_A: Bam! is fully compliant with the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). We do not collect or store users' files. Personal data is processed in accordance with the principles of minimization, transparency and security required by the regulation. Signaling servers are hosted in the
GDPR.DESC_B: region to ensure data residency in Europe.
